treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented with worsening dyspnea and chest pain.
EMS contacted, patient found to have HR in the 150s.
Patient given 21 mg of Diltiazem; HR improved.
Patient arrived at ED with HR again in the 150s, given 30 mg Diltiazem.
Patient converted to NSR within 10 mins after arrival.
CT scan indicates interval progression of disease with collapse of right lung.

patient_outcome.final_status: Patient was discharged home with hospice services.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient's quality of life is a mutual goal.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient and family are focusing on comfort at home.
